description: Extracts the row names from a .res, .gct, or .odf file.
author: Joshua Gould, Broad Institute
plan:
## ExtractRowNames GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
ExtractRowNames is a GenePattern module that Extracts the row names from a .res, .gct, or .odf file.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: input.filename, output
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>ExtractRowNames.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar org.genepattern.modules.extractrows.ExtractRowNames <input.filename> <output>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.filename
parameters.description: input file - .res, .gct, .odf, file from which the row names are extracted

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: output filename containing the row names - .txt
